channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Has incorrect bus nos displaying, 30th April
item.description:
Should be buses 419, 49 and 345

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersea Bridge Road, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 30th April
item.description:
Been in street for many weeks No MOT and has a Sorn
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denbridge Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped paddling pool in woods, 30th April
item.description:
Been there for sometime

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish from 51, 30th April
item.description:
51 Shortlands Road are not maintaining their bins properly which is causing a mess up & down the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken wall and street furniture, 30th April
item.description:
Looks like a car crashed into the wall, destroying an electrical box. There’s also flytipped rubbish here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 222, Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree - danger of falling limbs, 30th April
item.description:
This tree is dead it is on the pavement outside no13 there is a danger of the branches becoming brittle and falling on someone, a lot of children walk this way to school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown into my garden, 30th April
item.description:
17 abatross street- the tree on Nyanza street is hanging into my garden and has broken fence and is blocking lots of sun from the garen. I reported this last year but nothing has beem done
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albatross Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on the grass bank, left side of gate., 30th April
item.description:
Dead fox on the grass bank, left side of gate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London

item.description:
Been there for 7 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London

See photo

item.title: Abandoned car in private car park, 30th April
item.description:
Car has been left in private car park for a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaville Way, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire hazard., 30th April
item.description:
6 wooden built structures on pavement in poor condition. lots of poorly disposed smoking material and other rubbish that caused a fire earlier today. lid was removed to ensure item was extinguished and found it to be full of rubbish. all 6 showed signs of poor maintenance and careless disposal of smoking material.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Bridge Walk, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass on communal areas, 30th April
item.description:
Same problem with height of grass and trees that are growing, this has not been cut since last year.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Langbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 30th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Effra Parade, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: More and more rubbish dumped every day, 30th April
item.description:
More and more large rubbish dumped every day

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Effra Parade, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Van bumped into light column, 30th April
item.description:
Wires exposed. Danger at child height.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenlyon Road, Eltham

item.title: Massive pothole, 30th April
item.description:
This pothole has been growing for some time and is dangerous for cyclists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Loughborough Road, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Broken display, 30th April
item.description:
See photo. Potentially Dangerous.

item.title: Road was just fixed and it's sinking again, 30th April
item.description:
Road was sinking, closes the road for 3 days yet it's no better then before
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - Marnock Road alley, 30th April
item.description:
There is garbage all over the alleyway on Marnock Road (rear of Co Op store on Brockley Road). Garbage from the pub is overflowing from their red bins, bags are ripped open, cans everywhere in alley, animals have gotten into the bags. Pub name is written on boxes who leaves their garbage in the alley (see photo for pub name).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
